page_metadata.biotools__summary: F-seq is a software package that generates a continuous tag sequence density estimation based on tag sequencing to identify specific sequence features such as transcription factor binding sites (ChI-seq) or regions of open chromatin (DNase-seq).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: F-seq is a software package that generates a continuous tag sequence density estimation based on tag sequencing to identify specific sequence features such as transcription factor binding sites (ChI-seq) or regions of open chromatin (DNase-seq).
